data.body: De-flaked base results: 654(28f1)+655(4cdf) GREEN (V+MAX,LLM+MAX). 653(c366) failed on test_config_perf::test_warm_resolution_is_cheap (0.5014 < 0.5 wall-clock perf FLAKE, py3.13 only, 0.3% over — config removal cannot slow warm resolution). 656/659/663 CI pending. main stopped advancing (churn from FFO+migration settled). Rechecking 653; awaiting green window to close bottom-up + Submit (ADR 0047: plain Gerrit Submit, no auto-lander).
